title: sedum humifusum
intro: Sedum humifusum, also known as creeping sedum or golden sedum, is a perennial succulent plant in the family Crassulaceae. It is native to Europe and Asia, and is commonly used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Sedum humifusum include its ability to reduce fever, treat wounds, and relieve respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, Sedum humifusum can be made into a decoction, tea, or ointment, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
